title: Create a Flex Container with Gap
description: Create a flex container with 5 items and 1.5rem spacing between them.
instructions:
1. Create a container div
2. Add 5 child div items
3. Set display: flex
4. Add gap: 1.5rem
hints: Use display: flex and gap together
validation: Items should have 1.5rem space between each other.

title: Inline-Flex Button Group
description: Create a button group using inline-flex that sits inline with a paragraph.
instructions:
1. Create a paragraph element
2. Create a div with display: inline-flex
3. Add 3 button elements inside
4. Use gap for spacing between buttons
hints: Use display: inline-flex to keep the container inline
validation: The button group should sit on the same line as the paragraph.

title: Mixed Media Gallery
description: Create a flex container with different types of content: text, images, and buttons.
instructions:
1. Create a flex container
2. Include: a paragraph, an image (placeholder), a button
3. Use align-items: center for vertical alignment
4. Use gap for spacing
5. Make the container inline-flex so it can sit within a text block
hints: Use align-items: center for vertical centering
Inline-flex makes it flow with text
validation: All items should be vertically centered with consistent spacing.
